title: juncus balticus subsp. balticus
intro: Juncus balticus subsp. balticus, also known as Baltic rush or soft rush, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts and oils have been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
